query: We're letting companies transact with our agency portal. Set up "Log in with Corppass" for business users on the FAPI 2.0 Authorization API, including PAR and DPoP against id.corppass.gov.sg.
After Corppass login we need to pre-fill the applicant's Myinfo Business data — ACRA entity particulars, IRAS, and CPF corporate figures. How do we request and read it?
In the Corppass ID token the sub is the UEN and there's an act.sub UUID. Explain the entity-versus-user model and which one I should key the logged-in user on.
How do I read the e-service roles a company assigned to a user from auth_info, and enforce the StartDate/EndDate server-side?
A user logs in successfully but auth_info comes back with ESrvc_Row_Count 0. What does that mean and how should the UI handle an authenticated-but-unprovisioned user?
Tax agents and corporate secretaries act on behalf of their clients in our service. How do I authorise third-party service providers via tp_auth_info?
We're registering a new Corppass Login app on the Corppass Developer Portal. Which roles, entity types, and statuses do we configure, and which choices are one-way doors after publish?
Companies report their users can't log in to our B2G tender portal. Help me debug the Corppass FAPI 2.0 flow — DPoP-bound access token, the /userinfo call, and the auth_info retrieval.
Our Myinfo Business app is being rejected because we set authentication_context_type. What are the MIB compliance and configuration rules for a Myinfo Business app?
Our callback URL is https://portal.gov.sg/corppass/callback and the JWKS is on the same host. Onboarding rejected it — what are the URL rules for a Corppass integration?
An individual resident needs to log in as themselves and pre-fill their personal Myinfo profile (name, NRIC, address). Set up the citizen login flow.

Our existing Corppass integration reads entityInfo and userInfo claims (CPEntID, CPAccType, ISSPHOLDER) from a flat ID token and calls /authorization-info with a Bearer token. What's the migration deadline?
We're on Myinfo Business v2 with /entity-person and PKI_SIGN client_secret signing. When do we have to move to v3 and how?
Set up role-based access control, MFA, and access reviews for our internal agency officers who administer the tender system.
Add the Singapore Government banner, WOGAA registration, and the official footer to our new business-services website.
What are the PDPA obligations for storing corporate contact and personal data we retrieve about company officers, and how long can we retain it?
Review our per-request authorization checks and session hardening in the Node backend for an agency service.
Audit the company-search and results pages of our portal for WCAG 2.2 AA keyboard navigation and contrast.
Add enterprise SSO for our private B2B SaaS so customer companies can log in with their own IdP. Not a government system.
Which System Security Plan applies to our new cloud B2G portal and what control baseline do we need before we start building?
